refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance monitoring and feedback to operators.

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operational efficiency.
DP2: Integrated task management system for planning and scheduling.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and feedback interface for operator awareness.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operational efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task management systems.
Data exchange between telemetry and control modules.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically addresses FR1 directly and can be modularized with clear interfaces to other DPs, minimizing coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle control algorithms can be effectively isolated from task management and telemetry.
Risk that integration complexity may increase if interfaces are not well defined.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider refining DP2 and DP3 in subsequent decomposition levels to reduce coupling and clarify interfaces.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for vehicle control and operation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle control module sends operational data to monitoring systems.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task execution commands and schedules from task management.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication channel for remote control and data exchange.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of vehicle control logic; low diffusion as control algorithms are centralized.
Broader scope; control logic less contained due to integration with other functions.
Limited containment; control logic diffused due to remote operation focus.
Minimal containment; safety services focus on alerts and monitoring.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module best encapsulates the control algorithms needed to meet FR1 with minimal diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
Risk of overlapping responsibilities if task management is not clearly separated.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts and responsibilities with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules to reduce integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (advanced vehicle control algorithms) directly addresses the refined FR1 with clear functional mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists if control logic overlaps with Teleoperation module.
Need to monitor interface complexity with task management.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment scores, supporting effective packaging of DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and operational performance metrics collected from the Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of control algorithms to Vehicle module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine task management and telemetry DPs and their IM assignments in next decomposition level.
Define detailed interface specifications to reduce integration risks.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of sub-FRs and DPs related to task management and telemetry is needed to fully cover the productivity KPI and reduce integration risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance monitoring and feedback to operators.

revise.why: To decompose the productivity KPI into more granular functional requirements and corresponding design parameters for comprehensive coverage and reduced coupling.

assumptions: Vehicle control algorithms can be modularized within the Vehicle module.
Interfaces with Teleoperation and Safety Services are stable and well-defined.
open_risks: Integration complexity with task management and telemetry systems.
Potential overlap of responsibilities across modules.
evidence_needed: Performance data validating control algorithm effectiveness.
